# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: '[resourceGroup().location]'
    metadata:
      description: The Azure region where the virtual machine will be deployed.
  vmName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: myWebServerVm
    metadata:
      description: The name of the virtual machine.
  adminUsername:
    type: string
    defaultValue: azureuser
    metadata:
      description: Username for the Virtual Machine.
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: Password for the Virtual Machine.
  vmSize:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard_DS1_v2
    metadata:
      description: The size of the virtual machine.
  osType:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Linux
    allowedValues:
    - Linux
    - Windows
    metadata:
      description: The operating system type for the VM.
  linuxImagePublisher:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Canonical
    metadata:
      description: The publisher of the Linux OS image.
  linuxImageOffer:
    type: string
    defaultValue: UbuntuServer
    metadata:
      description: The offer of the Linux OS image.
  linuxImageSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 18.04-LTS
    metadata:
      description: The SKU of the Linux OS image.
  windowsImagePublisher:
    type: string
    defaultValue: MicrosoftWindowsServer
    metadata:
      description: The publisher of the Windows OS image.
  windowsImageOffer:
    type: string
    defaultValue: WindowsServer
    metadata:
      description: The offer of the Windows OS image.
  windowsImageSku:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 2019-Datacenter
    metadata:
      description: The SKU of the Windows OS image.
  subnetPrefix:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 10.0.0.0/24
    metadata:
      description: The subnet CIDR prefix.
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: myVnet
    metadata:
      description: The name of the virtual network.
  subnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: mySubnet
    metadata:
      description: The name of the subnet.
  publicIpAddressName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: myPublicIp
    metadata:
      description: The name of the public IP address.
  networkInterfaceName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: myNic
    metadata:
      description: The name of the network interface.

variables:
  apiVersion:
    network: 2023-09-01
    compute: 2023-09-01
  osDiskType: Standard_LRS
  dataDiskType: Standard_LRS
  dataDiskSizeGB: 128

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: '[variables(\'apiVersion\').network]'
    name: '[parameters(\'vnetName\')]'
    location: '[parameters(\'location\')]'
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - 10.0.0.0/16
      subnets:
        - name: '[parameters(\'subnetName\')]'
          properties:
            addressPrefix: '[parameters(\'subnetPrefix\')]'
  
  - type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    apiVersion: '[variables(\'apiVersion\').network]'
    name: '[parameters(\'publicIpAddressName\')]'
    location: '[parameters(\'location\')]'
    properties:
      publicIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
      dnsSettings:
        domainNameLabel: '[toLower(parameters(\'vmName\'))]'

  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces
    apiVersion: '[variables(\'apiVersion\').network]'
    name: '[parameters(\'networkInterfaceName\')]'
    location: '[parameters(\'location\')]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks\', parameters(\'vnetName\'))]'
      - '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses\', parameters(\'publicIpAddressName\'))]'
    properties:
      ipConfigurations:
        - name: ipconfig1
          properties:
            privateIPAllocationMethod: Dynamic
            publicIPAddress:
              id: '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses\', parameters(\'publicIpAddressName\'))]'
            subnet:
              id: '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets\', parameters(\'vnetName\'), parameters(\'subnetName\'))]'
      enableAcceleratedNetworking: true # Defaulting to enabled for performance

  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    apiVersion: '[variables(\'apiVersion\').compute]'
    name: '[parameters(\'vmName\')]'
    location: '[parameters(\'location\')]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces\', parameters(\'networkInterfaceName\'))]'
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: '[parameters(\'vmSize\')]'
      osProfile:
        computerName: '[parameters(\'vmName\')]'
        adminUsername: '[parameters(\'adminUsername\')]'
        adminPassword: '[parameters(\'adminPassword\')]'
        linuxConfiguration:
          disablePasswordAuthentication: false
          provisionVMAgent: true
        windowsConfiguration:
          enableAutomaticUpdates: true
          provisionVMAgent: true
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: '[if(equals(parameters(\'osType\'), \'Linux\'), parameters(\'linuxImagePublisher\'), parameters(\'windowsImagePublisher\'))]'
          offer: '[if(equals(parameters(\'osType\'), \'Linux\'), parameters(\'linuxImageOffer\'), parameters(\'windowsImageOffer\'))]'
          sku: '[if(equals(parameters(\'osType\'), \'Linux\'), parameters(\'linuxImageSku\'), parameters(\'windowsImageSku\'))]'
          version: latest
        osDisk:
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: '[variables(\'osDiskType\')]'
        dataDisks:
          - lun: 0
            createOption: Empty
            diskSizeGB: '[variables(\'dataDiskSizeGB\')]'
            managedDisk:
              storageAccountType: '[variables(\'dataDiskType\')]'
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - id: '[resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces\', parameters(\'networkInterfaceName\'))]'
      diagnosticsProfile:
        bootDiagnostics:
          enabled: true
          storageUri: '[reference(resourceId(\'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts\', concat(\'bootdiag\', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))), \'2023-01-01\').primaryEndpoints.blob]'

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: 2023-01-01
    name: '[concat(\'bootdiag\', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]'
    location: '[parameters(\'location\')]'
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2

outputs:
  vmPublicIpAddress:
    type: string
    value: '[reference(resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses\', parameters(\'publicIpAddressName\')), variables(\'apiVersion\').network).ipAddress]'
  vmFQDN:
    type: string
    value: '[reference(resourceId(\'Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses\', parameters(\'publicIpAddressName\')), variables(\'apiVersion\').network).dnsSettings.fqdn]'
